text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek has gotten used to playing the villain
since she entered the role for the autumn Tenno
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her efforts, people start to notice her
gentle nature.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the final battle of the year approaching, it
becomes clear that she'll be able to run as her
true self.
